meaning: vt.卷收,叠,收下vi.卷起,收拢n.卷收,卷起之物,卷起
examples: An attempt was made to furl the headsail.
On seeing Mr Frederick's banner, Ms Morse marched up and ordered him to furl it.
We're not going to go through the motions and pay tribute to one another, and then furl up the flags and go our separate ways.
